allow: Bash(node -e "const dns = require\('dns'\); dns.setServers\(['8.8.8.8','8.8.4.4']\); dns.resolve4\('google.com', \(e,a\) => console.log\(e ? 'DNS error: '+e.code : 'DNS works: '+a[0]\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const net = require\('net'\); const s = new net.Socket\(\); s.setTimeout\(5000\); s.connect\(27017, 'ac-eepang6-shard-00-00.rww1ndp.mongodb.net', \(\) => { console.log\('PORT OPEN'\); s.destroy\(\); }\); s.on\('error', e => console.log\('BLOCKED:', e.message\)\); s.on\('timeout', \(\) => console.log\('TIMEOUT'\)\);")
